tool.name: generate_xss_payloads
tool.description:
Generate context-aware XSS (Cross-Site Scripting) payloads.
Creates payloads optimized for specific injection contexts with optional WAF bypass techniques and encoding options.
Use this when you've identified a potential XSS injection point.

parameter.name: context
parameter.description: Injection context: - "html" (default) - Standard HTML body injection - "attribute" - Inside HTML attribute values - "javascript" - Inside JavaScript code - "href" - Inside href/src attributes - "template" - Inside template expressions - "multi" - All contexts

returns.description: Response containing: - 'payloads': List of XSS payloads with metadata - 'total_count': Number of payloads returned - 'context': Injection context - 'usage': Instructions for testing

tool.examples:
# Generate payloads for attribute injection
attribute
# Generate WAF bypass payloads
cloudflare unicode

tool.name: generate_sqli_payloads
tool.description:
Generate context-aware SQL injection payloads.
Creates payloads for different database backends and injection types including UNION, time-based blind, error-based, and stacked queries.
Use after detecting potential SQLi injection points.

parameter.name: column_count
parameter.description: Number of columns for UNION payloads (if known)

returns.description: Response containing: - 'payloads': List of SQLi payloads with metadata - 'total_count': Number of payloads - 'db_type': Target database - 'usage': Testing instructions

tool.examples:
# Generate MySQL-specific payloads
mysql union
# Generate time-based blind payloads
time_blind
# Generate UNION payloads for 5 columns
union 5

tool.name: generate_xxe_payloads
tool.description:
Generate XXE (XML External Entity) injection payloads.
Creates payloads for file disclosure, SSRF via XXE, and blind XXE data exfiltration attacks.
Use when XML processing is detected (SOAP, XML APIs, file uploads).

parameter.name: callback_url
parameter.description: Attacker callback URL for blind XXE (e.g., "http://attacker.com")

returns.description: Response containing: - 'payloads': List of XXE payloads with metadata - 'total_count': Number of payloads - 'usage': Testing instructions

tool.examples:
# Generate Linux file reading payloads
linux file_disclosure
# Generate payload for specific file
/app/config.php
# Generate blind XXE with callback
blind_exfil http://attacker.com

tool.name: generate_ssti_payloads
tool.description:
Generate SSTI (Server-Side Template Injection) payloads.
Creates payloads for various template engines: Jinja2, Twig, Freemarker, Velocity, ERB, Smarty, Thymeleaf.
Use when template engine rendering is detected.

returns.description: Response containing: - 'payloads': List of SSTI payloads with metadata - 'detection_tips': Tips for identifying SSTI

tool.examples:
# Generate detection payloads for all engines
detection
# Generate Jinja2 RCE payloads
jinja2 rce

tool.name: generate_cmd_injection_payloads
tool.description:
Generate OS command injection payloads.
Creates payloads for command chaining, time-based blind detection, and out-of-band exfiltration.
Use when application executes system commands with user input.

returns.description: Response containing: - 'payloads': List of command injection payloads - 'tips': Testing tips

tool.examples:
# Generate Linux command injection payloads
linux
# Generate time-based blind payloads
time_based
